challenge.description:
Special: After an enemy within close range declares a Supernatural or Spell action you may place 2 recharge tokens on this card to add , , or to that action's dice pool
You must spend 1 power per added to the pool in this way, or 3 power if you added

Improved Counterspell replaces Counterspell in your action deck and counts as Counterspell for all effects that reference it. If the action generated 1 or more , add to its results pool
